perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a male host wearing glasses and a plaid flat cap, speaking directly to the camera in a studio with a plain background. (2) A transition occurs showing several Vivo brand smartphones displayed in a store rack. (3) The scene cuts back to the host, who is now accompanied by floating graphics and images of tech CEOs like Tim Cook, Satya Nadella, and Jensen Huang as he discusses their AI usage. (4) Icons for AI services like Apple Intelligence, Copilot, Perplexity, and ChatGPT appear on screen during the discussion. (5) The host gestures frequently with his hands to emphasize his points. (6) The video ends with the host pointing toward the viewer, inviting engagement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-energy electronic background music begins immediately. A male voice speaks in a fast-paced, enthusiastic tone in Mandarin Chinese. (2) Swoosh sound effects are heard during graphic transitions and scene cuts. (3) The vocal track remains dominant throughout, with the music maintaining a consistent, energetic rhythm in the background. (4) The audio concludes with a final enthusiastic sentence and the music fading out quickly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '2025年科技圈' (Tech circle in 2025), '科技圈大佬如何運用AI?' (How do tech moguls use AI?). (2) Decorative/Effect Text: '3c有意思tim哥' (Brand/Host name), 'miko 米可手機館' (Endorsed brand). (3) Content Text: Summaries of CEO statements regarding Apple Intelligence, Microsoft Copilot, and AI research tools. (4) Hook Text: '推薦大家買手機到米可' (Recommend everyone buy phones at Miko), '留言告訴我' (Comment and tell me).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Product/Store Shoutout -> Informative List (CEO Examples) -> Call to Action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One main male creator performing a talking-head style video; other faces are static photos of CEOs.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a grey/black plaid flat cap, and a beige/brown sweatshirt with 'Roots' branding.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A neutral grey/blue studio background for the host, and a retail environment with rows of smartphones on display for the store shot.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Sponsor Placement -> Fact-based Examples -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to educate the audience on the practical applications of AI by citing examples from major tech industry leaders (Tim Cook, Satya Nadella, Jensen Huang), while simultaneously acting as an endorsement for the 'Miko' mobile phone retail chain in Taiwan.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The host explicitly recommends buying phones at Miko and features their logo and store footage in the video.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Host's signature flat cap and opening social media handle overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical tech-influencer style content focusing on efficiency and current trends to maintain authority and drive retail traffic.
